consentLongName.DS-NAFLD-IRB-NPU: Use of the data must be related to Nonalcoholic Fatty Liver Disease. Requesting institution's IRB or equivalent body must approve the requested use. Use of the data is limited to not-for-profit organizations.
consentLongName.DS-ALERG-IRB-PUB-COL-NPU: Use of the data must be related to Allergy. Requesting institution's IRB or equivalent body must approve the requested use. Requestor agrees to make results of studies using the data available to the larger scientific community. Requestor must provide a letter of collaboration with the primary study investigator(s). Use of the data is limited to not-for-profit organizations.
consentLongName.DS-NDR-MDS: Use of the data must be related to Neurological Disorders Research. The dataset can be used for methods research and development (e.g., development of statistical software or algorithms).
consentLongName.DS-HIST-MDS: Use of the data must be related to Histiocytoses. The dataset can be used for methods research and development (e.g., development of statistical software or algorithms).
consentLongName.DS-ASD-IRB-GSO: Use of the data must be related to Autism Spectrum Disorder. Requesting institution's IRB or equivalent body must approve the requested use. Use of the data is limited to genetic studies only.
consentLongName.DS-PACA-MDS: Use of the data must be related to Pancreatic Cancer. The dataset can be used for methods research and development (e.g., development of statistical software or algorithms).
consentLongName.DS-PACA-NPU-MDS: Use of the data must be related to Pancreatic Cancer. Use of the data is limited to not-for-profit organizations. The dataset can be used for methods research and development (e.g., development of statistical software or algorithms).
